summary: Verified removal of 'Espace Parent' button from /fr/aikido/dojo in adult mode. Logged in as admin@wayofdojo.com (Mode Samourai Confirme). The button data-testid='espace-parent-btn' does NOT exist on the page and 'Espace Parent' text count = 0. Page loads correctly with all expected adult dashboard elements (23 data-testids present including ma-progression, card-dojo-virtuel, etc.). 'Ma Progression' text present (count=2). 'Ceintures' present in sidebar (testid not verified since AdultTutorialBlocks tutorial component was not visibly rendered on this fresh dashboard - only main dashboard sections).
critical_code_review_comments: Note: Provided credentials 'adulte@wayofdojo.fr / 123456' returned 401. Only admin@wayofdojo.com/admin123 worked (which is in adult mode - 'Mode Samourai Confirme'). Update test credentials doc if needed.
Login route is /fr/aikido/login (not /fr/login). The [sport] segment is mandatory for auth pages.
test_credentials: admin@wayofdojo.com / admin123 (adult mode - works). adulte@wayofdojo.fr / 123456 (returns 401 - broken)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Adult dashboard at /fr/aikido/dojo uses testids: adult-sidebar, adult-header, adult-dashboard, profile-card, tanaka-hero, card-dojo-virtuel, card-technique-jour, card-defi-jour, ma-progression, vertus-section. However, verified globally by data-testid selector + text search that Espace Parent is absent.
